name: sortBy
description: Creates a comparison function for sorting arrays of objects by a specific field with optional value transformation.
usage_guidelines: Use with Array.sort() for sorting object arrays.
Set reverse to true for descending order.
Use primer function to transform values before comparison.

params.name: reverse
params.description: Sort in descending order if true.

params.name: primer
params.description: Function to transform values before comparison.

Do: Use primer for case-insensitive string sorting
Dont: Don't mutate original array without copying
